channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Tornado barrels through Oklahoma, damaging 40 homes and shutting down roads
item.description: Officials say a powerful tornado that barreled through Oklahoma damaged about 40 homes in one county and sent emergency crews door-to-door in a hard hit neighborhood.

item.title: US soldier charged with using classified intel to win $400K on Maduro raid is due in court
Correspondents’ Dinner’s biggest moments involve laughs, cringing and high-stakes politics
